name: Quail Breasts and Truffle Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Yellow zucchini, 2 uncooked (sliced into 48 very thin circles)
30 g Truffle (sliced into 12 very thin slices)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make herb vinaigrette: Finely chop onion, chives, Italian parsley, and a pinch of tarragon together. Add salt, pepper, walnut oil, sherry vinegar, and wine vinegar to taste.
2. Make truffle juice vinaigrette: Combine bottled truffle juice with olive oil in a 2:1 ratio (oil to vinegar), adding a small amount of white wine vinegar if desired.
3. Cut asparagus tips from stems using slanting cuts so they stand upright at an angle for garnish.
4. Cook quail breasts:
- Season and pan-fry in hot melted butter over medium-high heat, about 1 minute per side until golden brown.
5. Prepare chanterelles: Lightly salt them, sauté with a drop of white wine and chicken stock in butter containing the herbs from the herb vinaigrette. Reduce sauce completely, then marinate chanterelles in herb vinaigrette for 30 minutes.
6. Assemble salad:
- Create central garnish: Arrange 11 overlapping yellow zucchini slices, place a small pile of tomato brunoise on one slice, and position asparagus tips outward from the center.
- Form three islands with chanterelles, frisee lettuce, and Italian parsley. Place truffle slices between islands and atop each quail breast. Drizzle herb vinaigrette over lettuce and truffle juice vinaigrette over the garnish.
Serves 4
